{{CharInfobox|Box title = Ayaka|image = File:Ayaka.jpg|gender = Female|hometown = Acania Dock|leader of = Acania Gym|badge = Haze Badge|speciality = Gas Type|hair colour = Blue|caption = The toxic trainer!}}'''Ayaka''' is Leader of [[Acania Gym]]. Her hometown is [[Acania Dock]], and she specializes in '''Gas''' Type Pokemon.

She will confer the '''Haze Badge''' and '''TM92 Mustard Gas''' upon defeat.
